title: Intuit QuickBooks Upsell Targeting
summary: Profit-maximizing ML ensemble ranked #1 of 60 teams. Engineered features on 75K structured records, built and tuned Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, and MLP models, then scaled predictions to 800K+ population.

title: Customer Message Optimization (NPTB)
summary: End-to-end ML pipeline on ~600K customer-email rows using Python and Polars. XGBoost final model achieved €0.84/customer and +51.3% uplift vs random — ~€1.42M projected at 5M customers.

title: Traway Operations Analytics
summary: Cohort and pricing analysis for a student-led mobility startup across 3,200 customers. Applied segmentation and regression to improve retention to 60%+ and achieve 3× increase in AOV.
